title: Shishi
summary: Nonprofit mobile app that connects hosts, guests, and donors to organize and fund free community Shabbat dinners — host-approved sign-ups, in-app messaging, and a safety feature that hides personal details.
highlights: Host-approved sign-up flow for guests and donors
In-app messaging between hosts and guests
Safety feature that hides personal details until approved

title: Outpost
summary: Fashion platform with taste-aware product recommendations — compares prices across 18+ retailers and alerts users to price drops. Built a "Product DNA" tagging system over a catalog of ~8,000 products.

title: Nest
summary: AI-powered document management platform for small businesses — digitizes and organizes files automatically using OCR, natural language processing, and intelligent tagging.

title: Real Estate News Reporter
summary: Automated Python script that aggregates and analyzes real estate market news using web scraping and natural language processing to provide daily market insights.
highlights: Automated news aggregation from multiple real estate sources
Natural language processing for sentiment analysis
Daily email reports with market insights

title: Personal Portfolio Website
summary: Modern, responsive portfolio website showcasing my projects, experience, and creative work. Built with performance and accessibility in mind.

title: Book Keeper
summary: Full-stack application for book enthusiasts to track reading progress, share reviews, and discover new books through community recommendations.
highlights: Cross-platform mobile app for iOS and Android
